author: dcadolph
description: Chop AI slop from your notes. The rules engine runs locally in the app; your text never leaves the vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: dcadolph
manifest.description: Chop AI slop from your notes. The rules engine runs locally in the app; your text never leaves the vault.
manifest.name: slop-chop

name: slop-chop

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Built from dcadolph/slop-chop@17d50c1cc89afa68d68c6334342a22fe0cfbf245. The engine ships inside main.js as gzipped WebAssembly and is decoded in memory: no filesystem access, no network. Assets carry build provenance attestations; verify with: gh attestation verify main.js --repo dcadolph/slop-chop-obsidian

releases.author: dcadolph
releases.description: Updates the bundled engine to v0.26.0: the audit-hardening fixes across the rules engine, including the self-referential swap fix and the casing fix for word replacements. Chop note, chop selection, cursor and scroll are preserved, and the engine boots once under concurrent chops.

releases.author: dcadolph
releases.description: First release. Chop note / Chop selection commands, voice settings, engine inlined and local.
